🍺 Birdie Juice Tracking

Betting Games
🐍 Snake 3-Putt Game✓ Active▶
Whoever holds the 3-putt snake after your 3rd, 6th, 9th, 12th, 15th and 18th holes pays each other participant the selected wager. The Snake resets after each settlement hole.
Bet amount (per player per settlement)
Participants (who is in the game?)
2v2 Nassau Games (High-Low)✓ Active▶
Select as many pairings as you wish — Pards Golf will score all of them. Tap a pairing to add it, then set the bet amount.
1v1 Nassau Games✓ Active▶
Select as many matchups as you wish — Pards Golf will score all of them. Tap a matchup to add it, then set the bet amount.
🎯 6-Point Game✓ Active▶
Pick any 3 players for a separate 6-Point game (lowest player dropped to 0, net, no presses — 6 points up for grabs every hole).
🏆 Stableford✓ Active▶
Individual points game. Full handicap applied. Highest points total wins — loser pays winner the points difference × bet.
💰 Skins✓ Active▶
Each hole is worth one skin. Win the hole outright to take the skin — ties carry the skin over to the next hole, so pots build up. Tap players to include them, then set the value per skin.
🎲 Vegas✓ Active▶
Fixed 2-vs-2. Each team's two scores combine into a number, low score first (a 4 and 5 make 45). Teams play the difference each hole × the dollar value. If the other team makes a birdie, your number flips high-first (45 → 54). Needs exactly 4 players.
⚔️ Match Cards✓ Active▶
Match cards with up to 2 players from other groups. They're not scored during your round — at round end a separate ⚔️ Match Cards round is saved (your scores prefilled). Enter their scores later from History. You play a 1v1 Nassau vs each.

🧹 Clear THIS round's setup screen?
Only clears the player names, handicaps, and game selections you see right now — like erasing a whiteboard before filling it in again.

Your saved players, round history, and backups are never touched.
